query: SELECT p.id, p.name, p.description, p.price, p.is_active, p.sort_order, c.name as category_name FROM products p LEFT JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.id WHERE p.establishment_id = 150004 ORDER BY c.sort_order ASC, p.sort_order ASC;
